info.title: Digital Twin Fisiologico API
info.description: Stateless physiology analytics API. HTTP routers are thin; application services orchestrate engines under `engines/`.

status.title: Status
status.description: Always 'ok' when the service is up.

post.description: Upload one or more FIT files (sprint + CP blocks). Returns a ProfileProposal for coach review. Does not commit an anchor.

schema.title: EnginePayload
schema.description:
Open-ended JSON returned by physiology engines.

Field semantics, tiers and confidence rules are documented in
``docs/FRONTEND_DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md``. Treat unknown keys as forward-compatible.

gender.title: Gender
gender.description: MALE or FEMALE for physiological priors.

active_muscle_mass_kg.title: Active Muscle Mass Kg
active_muscle_mass_kg.description: Optional active muscle mass override for Mader modelling.

AthleteProfileSnippet.title: AthleteProfileSnippet
AthleteProfileSnippet.description: Subset of athlete fields commonly embedded in TwinState or workout context.

metabolic_snapshot_json.title: Metabolic Snapshot Json
metabolic_snapshot_json.description: Successful /profile/snapshot JSON — enables MLSS-based metabolic zones alongside Coggan.

metabolic_snapshot_json.title: Metabolic Snapshot Json
metabolic_snapshot_json.description: Successful /profile/snapshot JSON to unlock durability sections.

files.title: Files
files.description: FIT files from the test session.

CalendarPlanEvent.title: CalendarPlanEvent
CalendarPlanEvent.description: One planned workout/assignment in a season projection.

current_status.title: Current Status
current_status.description: Current assignment status in calendar FSM.

measured_on.title: Measured On
measured_on.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD of the test session.

EnginePayload.title: EnginePayload
EnginePayload.description:
Open-ended JSON returned by physiology engines.

Field semantics, tiers and confidence rules are documented in
``docs/FRONTEND_DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md``. Treat unknown keys as forward-compatible.

sprint_power.title: Sprint Power
sprint_power.description: Optional maximal sprint power trace (Hz) for power-derived VLamax proxy.

status.title: Status
status.description: Always 'ok' when the service is up.

InPersonAthlete.title: InPersonAthlete
InPersonAthlete.description: Tablet test athlete envelope — see TEST_JSON_CONTRACT.md.

InPersonTestData.title: InPersonTestData
InPersonTestData.description: Protocol-specific block — extra keys allowed per TEST_JSON_CONTRACT.md.

PowerDurationPoint.title: PowerDurationPoint
PowerDurationPoint.description: MMP value for a single duration.

PowerSourceActivity.title: PowerSourceActivity
PowerSourceActivity.description: One activity signature for offset detection.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: Activities with source_id and MMP signatures.

improvements.title: Improvements
improvements.description: Number of duration records improved on this ride.

ride_usable.title: Ride Usable
ride_usable.description: Whether the ride should contribute to the curve.

effective_cadence_rpm.title: Effective Cadence Rpm
effective_cadence_rpm.description: Optional cadence anchor (rpm) for VLamax limitations when stream cadence is unavailable.

tau_model.title: Tau Model
tau_model.description: W′ reconstitution model for coach-facing τ metadata on the snapshot.

snapshot.title: Snapshot
snapshot.description: Full metabolic snapshot to calibrate in one call.

calibration_model.title: Calibration Model
calibration_model.description: Previously persisted model; omit to start fresh.

payload.description: Initial athlete anchor, snapshot, curve and profile fragments.

TwinStateDocument.title: TwinStateDocument
TwinStateDocument.description: Canonical twin_state.v1 blob for update/projection endpoints.

as_of.title: As Of
as_of.description: ISO date of the ride used for the update.

load_factor.title: Load Factor
load_factor.description: Optional load scaling for Bayesian update.

WorkoutFeasibilityContext.title: WorkoutFeasibilityContext
WorkoutFeasibilityContext.description: Optional readiness/fatigue context for W′ simulation.

tau_model.title: Tau Model
tau_model.description: W′ reconstitution model selector (skiba_default, bartram_elite, pugh_level_based, individualized).

athlete_profile.description: Athlete CP/FTP/weight used to resolve percentage targets.

WorkoutStepInput.title: WorkoutStepInput
WorkoutStepInput.description: Single workout step — mirrors engines.workouts.models.WorkoutStep JSON.

workout.description: Workout template or coach draft with steps.

BearerAuth.description: JWT from your OIDC provider (DIGITAL_TWIN_AUTH_MODE=jwt) or static API key (DIGITAL_TWIN_AUTH_MODE=api_key). Athlete-scoped routes also require X-Athlete-Id.

AthleteIdHeader.name: X-Athlete-Id
AthleteIdHeader.description: Target athlete identifier for coach/admin scoped requests.
